content: R.1.a — Add schemas: CandidateGarment, OutfitCanvas, MarketplaceSuggestion, ProfessionalSuggestion (app/models/schemas.py)
R.1.b — Create app/services/outfit_composer.py: per-image analysis → dedup → score → compose → gap-detect
R.1.c — Create app/services/marketplace_search.py: query listings by category/budget/tags, ranked
R.1.d — Create app/services/professional_matcher.py: heuristic keyword → specialty → /professionals query
R.1.e — Add POST /api/v1/stylist/compose-outfit (multipart) wiring all of the above + persist as StylistMessage
R.2.a — Stylist.jsx: attachment button, image-chip preview, send-with-images calls compose-outfit
R.2.b — New OutfitCanvas.jsx component (head-to-toe slots, rejected panel, marketplace strip, pro card)
R.2.c — New /stylist/compose route (deferred — in-chat composer covers MVP per choice 1c)
R.3 — Backend smoke-test compose-outfit with fixture images (✓)
